name: Sumigami
short_description: Sumigami is a walking simulator set in a world of enigmatic creatures. Ranging from wholesome to horrific, each encounter pulls you deeper into a haunting journey with a unique visual style.
detailed_description:
You wake up in the middle of the night the very first night after moving in your new apartment and everything is bit different. A dark corridor just appeared and will lead you to a whole new world made of familiar rooms populated with weird creatures, the Sumigamis. Investigate your past to find the escape out of this nightmare!

Explore

Explore the ever-changing Sumigami world with only your flash-light and courage and try to understand what is happening to you. The various creature are here to help, but are also searching for an escape just as you.

Collect

You will find a bunch of items. Each one helping you understand better what made you who you are and what needs to be done to escape.

Run

Not all creatures are friendly, and when the escape way will become clearer, everyone will try to make it. Never hesitate to run for your life, although sometimes fighting back might be the only option.

Evolving visuals

The visuals of the game will evolve along the history and depending on what is happening on screen. The visuals are based on the work of the artist Andre Da Costa, famous for his grim and curious black-and-white world filled with cute but scary creatures.

2 endings available
There are two possible endings. By completing the game while having encountered all the Sumigami the story will lead to a different conclusion.

Play Time
This is a short game that can be completed in about 30 minutes to an hour. Enjoy a condensed and immersive experience.

Streaming & Let's Plays are welcome
Streaming and Let's Plays on any platforms of this game are welcome. Feel free to share your experience with other players.
